DTR  |  Listen to a Classroom Conversation
LCC-HS12-L2-BR300-HSELA1112-STP-LAT-02 • HS English 11-12: Rhetorical Devices

The Pitch on Roberto Clemente Way

Click  🎧  to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a teacher and a student. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer some questions.
Listen to the Conversation
1QUESTION 1: What is the topic of this conversation?
2QUESTION 2: According to the student, why should the judges trust their team to tell these stories?
3QUESTION 3: What does the student's final analogy suggest about the podcast?
Choose the best answer for each question. You may change your answers before submitting.
Answer all 3 questions to submit.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Why does the teacher keep asking the student questions? Why does the student bring up Doña Marta?
CA ELD PI.A.1, PI.A.3, PI.B.5, PI.B.6  |  CCSS.ELA-LITERACY.RI.11-12.6  |  HS English 11-12: Rhetorical Devices
